mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id, u.user_name, u.user_birth, u.user_nickname, u.user_email, u.user_phone, u.user_gender, s.shelter_name, s.shelter_certification FROM ddd_user u JOIN ddd_user_shelter s ON u.user_number = s.user_number WHERE u.user_number = #{userNumber}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.DOG_NUMBER AS dogNumber, A.DOG_NAME AS dogName, A.DOG_BREED AS dogBreed,
A.DOG_GENDER AS dogGender, AI.ARCHIVE_IMG_PATH AS archiveImgPath FROM DDD_ARCHIVE A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DOG_NUMBER, ARCHIVE_IMG_PATH FROM ( SELECT DOG_NUMBER, ARCHIVE_IMG_PATH, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY DOG_NUMBER ORDER BY ARCHIVE_IMG_NUMBER ASC) as RN FROM DDD_ARCHIVE_IMG ) WHERE RN = 1 ) AI ON A.DOG_NUMBER = AI.DOG_NUMBER WHERE A.USER_NUMBER = #{userNumber} ORDER BY A.DOG_NUMBER DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 4
select count(user_number) from ddd_user where user_nickname = #{userNickname} AND user_number != #{userNumber}
